===[[Pokémon Puzzle League]]===
[[File:Pokémon Puzzle League Spa Service Intro.png|thumb|200px|James in Pokémon Puzzle League]]
James is teamed with Jessie in {{pkmn|Puzzle League}}, with a party of Weezing, Arbok, and {{p|Golbat}}. They are the main opponents in the "Spa Service" line clear challenge.
